name: learn-marketplace
description: Single-plugin marketplace hosting the `learn` plugin — institutional memory (CLAUDE.md + LEARNINGS.md + thoughts/) for any project.

plugins.name: learn
plugins.description: Institutional memory for any project. /learn:init, /learn:brainstorm, /learn:capture-failure, /learn:capture-win, /learn:audit, /learn:recall, /learn:retrospective. Ships 7 skills, 3 subagents, 4 hooks, an 8-tool MCP server, and 5 project-type templates.
